title: RM-05B record close queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-05':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = 'a645ffcc415722d8224dd9247d7130eb604031cf'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:35:01Z'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:39:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
lines = [
json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:27:19Z','id':'RM-01','trace_id':'rm01_revoke_false_pass_bem1284_gate2','sha':'0d801ea289ed0a6d580506d7772e598959a06fcb','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False),
json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:30:32Z','id':'RM-02','trace_id':'rm02_fail_closed_truncated_py_pattern','sha':'e2a382ea6b283cc62ef5a621f36098f3efef46b8','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False),
json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:31:59Z','id':'RM-03','trace_id':'rm03_ast_parse_gate_stub_runnable','sha':'08070e58697a4399c1884b601c23522ba4ec9299','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False),
json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:33:28Z','id':'RM-04','trace_id':'rm04_pass_diagnostic_consistency','sha':'62cf5625e287f9d4b77f4ffd259ecd9e1972cb13','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False),
json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:35:01Z','id':'RM-05','trace_id':'rm05_kz1_runners_after_pre_kz_block','sha':'a645ffcc415722d8224dd9247d7130eb604031cf','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
]
for line in lines:
    if line not in existing:
        existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/RM05B_RECORD_RM05_CLOSE_QUEUE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-05B','trace_id':'rm05b_record_rm05_close_queue','status':'completed','release_pass':True,'recorded_steps':['RM-01','RM-02','RM-03','RM-04','RM-05'],'queue_state':'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'ACTIVE_QUEUE empty; do not invent tasks'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM05B_RECORD_RM05_CLOSE_QUEUE.md')
report.write_text('# RM-05B | Record RM-05 and close queue\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRM-01..RM-05 are DONE in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and recorded in governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl. Queue state is EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS. Per three-file model, GPT must not invent new tasks when the queue is empty.\n\nWorkflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: await operator or Claude to add next tasks.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
